auth.heading: Admin Login
auth.newPasswordDesc: Your account was created with a temporary password. Set a permanent password to continue.
auth.passwordRequirements: Password must contain at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
auth.challengeExpired: Password setup session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.errorGeneric: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

home.metaDescription: A refined coastal retreat with curated suites, signature experiences, and elevated dining.
home.heroTitle: Cliffside serenity with timeless Mediterranean soul
home.heroSubtitle: Set high above the waterline, {{brandName}} blends heritage architecture, botanical gardens, and modern hospitality into one immersive stay.
home.introHeading: A five-star hideaway designed for slow mornings and cinematic evenings
home.introDesc: Originally conceived as a hillside estate and now reimagined as a contemporary sanctuary, our retreat offers sea-facing terraces, fragrant citrus courtyards, and personalized service that anticipates every detail.
home.offerCreditDesc: Receive a $220 resort credit to elevate your stay with wellness sessions, dining, or private excursions.
home.offerEscapeDesc: Stay three nights or more and enjoy preferred rates, daily breakfast, and expedited coastal transfers.
home.spaDesc: Signature rituals draw on citrus oils, marine minerals, and thermal therapies to restore body and mind.

gardenTerrace.name: Garden Terrace Room
gardenTerrace.desc: A quiet retreat with private terrace seating, handcrafted linens, and morning light over the orchard.

seaHorizon.name: Sea Horizon Suite
seaHorizon.desc: Expansive indoor-outdoor living with panoramic bay views, marble bath, and curated welcome amenities.

grandVilla.name: Grand Villa Residence
grandVilla.desc: A private residence experience with dedicated host service, sunset lounge deck, and chef breakfast.

sunsetCruise.title: Sunset Coastal Cruise
sunsetCruise.blurb: Sail the cliffline at golden hour with a sommelier-led tasting of local sparkling wines.

vineyardJourney.title: Volcanic Vineyard Journey
vineyardJourney.blurb: Travel into the highlands for cellar tours, chef-paired lunch, and views over ancient terraces.

heritageWalk.title: Cinema & Heritage Walk
heritageWalk.blurb: Discover storied piazzas and iconic filming landmarks with a private cultural concierge.

reservations.subtitle: Create new bookings, review active stays, and manage availability from one place.
reservations.loadingDesc: Gathering the latest bookings and availability details.
reservations.emptyDesc: Create your first reservation to begin managing guest stays.
reservations.errorLoad: Failed to load reservations. Please check your API configuration.
reservations.errorCreate: Failed to create reservation. Please try again.
reservations.errorDelete: Failed to delete reservation. Please try again.
reservations.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
